# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-payment-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
  annotations:
    description: "Payment gateway API - Stripe"
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.stripe.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "payment-service"
    - "checkout-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-email-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
  annotations:
    description: "Email service - SendGrid API"
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.sendgrid.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "notification-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-auth-provider
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
  annotations:
    description: "OAuth2 provider - Auth0"
spec:
  hosts:
    - "*.auth0.com"
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: NONE
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "auth-service"
    - "api-gateway"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-maps-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
  annotations:
    description: "Google Maps API for geolocation services"
spec:
  hosts:
    - maps.googleapis.com
    - maps.google.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "location-service"
    - "delivery-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-s3-storage
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: cloud-storage
  annotations:
    description: "AWS S3 bucket access for file storage"
spec:
  hosts:
    - "*.s3.amazonaws.com"
    - "*.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com"
    - "*.s3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com"
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: NONE
  exportTo:
    - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-postgres-primary
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
  annotations:
    description: "Primary PostgreSQL database hosted on AWS RDS"
spec:
  hosts:
    - primary-db.cluster-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 5432
      name: tcp-postgres
      protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "order-service"
    - "inventory-service"
    - "user-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-postgres-readonly
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
  annotations:
    description: "Read replica PostgreSQL database on AWS RDS"
spec:
  hosts:
    - readonly-db.cluster-ro-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 5432
      name: tcp-postgres
      protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "reporting-service"
    - "analytics-service"
    - "search-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-redis-cache
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
  annotations:
    description: "ElastiCache Redis cluster for caching"
spec:
  hosts:
    - redis-cluster.abc123.0001.use1.cache.amazonaws.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 6379
      name: tcp-redis
      protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-mongodb-atlas
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
  annotations:
    description: "MongoDB Atlas cluster for document storage"
spec:
  hosts:
    - "*.mongodb.net"
  addresses: []
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 27017
      name: tcp-mongo
      protocol: TLS
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: NONE
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "catalog-service"
    - "content-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-elasticsearch
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
  annotations:
    description: "Elastic Cloud Elasticsearch cluster"
spec:
  hosts:
    - my-cluster.es.us-east-1.aws.found.io
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 9243
      name: https-elastic
      protocol: TLS
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "search-service"
    - "logging-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-kafka-cluster
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-messaging
  annotations:
    description: "Confluent Cloud Kafka cluster"
spec:
  hosts:
    - pkc-abc123.us-east-1.aws.confluent.cloud
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 9092
      name: tcp-kafka
      protocol: TCP
    - number: 9093
      name: tcp-kafka-tls
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "*"
---
# --- VirtualService configurations for traffic routing to external hosts ---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-payment-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.stripe.com
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "payment-service"
    - "checkout-service"
  tls:
    - match:
        - port: 443
          sniHosts:
            - api.stripe.com
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.stripe.com
            port:
              number: 443
          weight: 100
  # No http routes since this is TLS passthrough
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-email-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.sendgrid.com
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "notification-service"
  tls:
    - match:
        - port: 443
          sniHosts:
            - api.sendgrid.com
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.sendgrid.com
            port:
              number: 443
          weight: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-postgres-primary
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
  annotations:
    description: "Route traffic to primary PostgreSQL with timeout and retry settings"
spec:
  hosts:
    - primary-db.cluster-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "order-service"
    - "inventory-service"
    - "user-service"
  tcp:
    - match:
        - port: 5432
      route:
        - destination:
            host: primary-db.cluster-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
            port:
              number: 5432
          weight: 100
      # TCP keepalive and connection timeout
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-postgres-readonly
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
  annotations:
    description: "Route read-only traffic to PostgreSQL read replica"
spec:
  hosts:
    - readonly-db.cluster-ro-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "reporting-service"
    - "analytics-service"
    - "search-service"
  tcp:
    - match:
        - port: 5432
      route:
        - destination:
            host: readonly-db.cluster-ro-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
            port:
              number: 5432
          weight: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1

metadata:
  name: vs-external-redis-cache
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
    - redis-cluster.abc123.0001.use1.cache.amazonaws.com
  tcp:
    - match:
        - port: 6379
      route:
        - destination:
            host: redis-cluster.abc123.0001.use1.cache.amazonaws.com
            port:
              number: 6379
          weight: 100

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-elasticsearch
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
    - my-cluster.es.us-east-1.aws.found.io
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "search-service"
    - "logging-service"
  tls:
    - match:
        - port: 9243
          sniHosts:
            - my-cluster.es.us-east-1.aws.found.io
      route:
        - destination:
            host: my-cluster.es.us-east-1.aws.found.io
            port:
              number: 9243
          weight: 100
    - match:
        - port: 443
          sniHosts:
            - my-cluster.es.us-east-1.aws.found.io
      route:
        - destination:
            host: my-cluster.es.us-east-1.aws.found.io
            port:
              number: 443
          weight: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-kafka
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-messaging
spec:
  hosts:
    - pkc-abc123.us-east-1.aws.confluent.cloud
  tls:
    - match:
        - port: 9093
          sniHosts:
            - pkc-abc123.us-east-1.aws.confluent.cloud
      route:
        - destination:
            host: pkc-abc123.us-east-1.aws.confluent.cloud
            port:
              number: 9093
          weight: 100
  tcp:
    - match:
        - port: 9092
      route:
        - destination:
            host: pkc-abc123.us-east-1.aws.confluent.cloud
            port:
              number: 9092
          weight: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-maps-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  hosts:
    - maps.googleapis.com
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "location-service"
    - "delivery-service"
  tls:
    - match:
        - port: 443
          sniHosts:
            - maps.googleapis.com
      route:
        - destination:
            host: maps.googleapis.com
            port:
              number: 443
          weight: 100
---
# --- DestinationRule configurations for connection pool and TLS settings ---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-payment-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  host: api.stripe.com
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: api.stripe.com
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
        connectTimeout: 5s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 7200s
          interval: 75s
          probes: 10
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DEFAULT
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 100
        maxRetries: 3
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 60s
      maxEjectionPercent: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-email-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  host: api.sendgrid.com
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: api.sendgrid.com
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 50
        connectTimeout: 5s
      http:
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 50
        maxRetries: 3
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 3
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-postgres-primary
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  host: primary
